rules: Do not mix AI self-check artifacts with real user testing artifacts.
AI-simulated users are AI tests, not real user tests.
Do not place test artifacts in the repo root.
Do not create output/ or outputs/ at repo root.
If output/ or outputs/ already exists, classify contents into .test/ai, .test/user, or .plan/archive before claiming archive cleanup is complete.
Do not place test artifacts in .plan/.
Do not put real user feedback inside .test/ai; do not put model-generated feedback inside .test/user.
Keep large raw logs out of chat context. Store raw files under evidence roots and summarize them in reports.
Record test strategy in .plan/SPEC.md and task status in .plan/CHECKLIST.md.
